beer.beer_name: The Cool Kids - Fairy Bread Milkshake IPA
beer.beer_description: We’re bringing you a nostalgic fave in adult form! This Milkshake IPA has got a sweet, creamy and bready body, perfectly balanced with the pungent aromas of tropical fruits from four carefully selected hops: the new Peacherine, plus crowd-pleasing classics of Simcoe, Cryo Mosaic and Idaho 7.

user.bio: Constantly searching for new beers, no point stopping now?!

items.badge_description: It's time to give bottle shops some love by adding them as your purchased location. That's 395 check-ins with a purchased location! Tag 5 more to get to Level 80. Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

What happens when you take two or more amazing breweries, throw them into the tank and let them ferment together? An amazing collaboration beer, that’s what! Cheers to working together to create the perfect flavor. That's 50 different beers that have been brewed as a collaboration. Try 5 more for Level 11!

user.bio: South Aussie living in Melbourne. Go Port Adelaide!

user.bio:
And every time I wonder
where the world went wrong,
end up lying on my face
going ringy dingy ding dong.
In wine there is wisdom; in beer there is freedom.
Work less, play more, drink better beer

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay.
